# Snice — Full Reference

> Decorator-driven web component framework with differential rendering, routing, controllers, and 130+ UI components. Zero dependencies. MIT licensed.

- Version: 4.34.x
- Website: https://snice.dev
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/snice
- CDN: https://cdn.snice.dev

For per-component docs, use the MCP server: `claude mcp add snice -- npx snice mcp`

---

## Installation

```bash
npx snice create-app my-app
npx snice create-app my-app --template=react
```

### Manual Setup

Requires bundler (Vite, esbuild, Rollup). package.json: `"type": "module"`

tsconfig.json:
```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "lib": ["ES2022", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "experimentalDecorators": false,
    "useDefineForClassFields": false
  }
}
```

---

## Architecture

- **Elements** (`@element`): Visual web components with Shadow DOM. Receive data via properties, emit events. NO business logic, NO fetch(), NO API calls.
- **Pages** (`@page`): Routable views. Handle API calls, orchestrate elements, manage state.
- **Controllers** (`@controller`): Reusable non-visual behaviors attached to elements.
- **Layouts** (`@layout`): Persistent page wrappers (nav, sidebar) across route changes.

---

## Decorators

### Class Decorators

```typescript
@element('tag-name', options?: { formAssociated?: boolean })
@page({ tag, routes, guards?, placard? })   // `page` from Router(), NOT 'snice'
@controller('name')
@layout('tag-name')
```

### Rendering

```typescript
@render(options?: { debounce?, throttle?, once?, sync?, differential? })
// Returns TemplateResult from html`...`. Auto re-renders on @property changes.
// differential: true (default) — patches only changed nodes
// differential: false — clears shadow root, re-renders from scratch
// once: true — imperative mode: renders once, use @watch + @query to update

@styles()
// Returns CSSResult from css`...`. Scoped to shadow DOM. Called once (not reactive).
```

### Properties

```typescript
@property(options?: { type?, attribute?, converter?, hasChanged? })
// Types: String (default), Number, Boolean, Object, Array
// Syncs with attributes, triggers re-render
// Boolean attrs: "false" string → false (non-standard)
// No `reflect` option — attributes sync automatically

@watch(...propertyNames: string[])
// Callback: (oldVal, newVal, propertyName) => void
```

### Lifecycle

```typescript
@ready()     // After styles + event handlers set up
@dispose()   // On disconnectedCallback
@moved()     // On adoptedCallback
@adopted()   // Alias for @moved
```

### DOM Queries

```typescript
@query(selector, options?: { light?: boolean })    // Single element
@queryAll(selector, options?: { light?: boolean })  // NodeListOf<Element>
// Default: shadow DOM. { light: true } for controllers on native elements.
```

### Events

```typescript
// Template:
html`<button @click=${handler}>...`
html`<input @keydown:Enter=${handler} />`
html`<input @keydown.ctrl+s=${handler} />`

// Decorator:
@on(event, selector?, options?)
// Options: { debounce?, throttle?, preventDefault?, stopPropagation?, once?, capture?, passive?, target? }

@dispatch(eventName, options?: { debounce?, throttle?, dispatchOnUndefined? })
// Fires CustomEvent with return value as detail. Supports async.
```

### Communication

```typescript
@request(channel, options?)
// Async generator: yield payload → await response
// Options: { timeout?, discoveryTimeout?, debounce?, throttle?, bubbles?, cancelable? }

@respond(channel, options?)
// Handle requests. One responder per channel.

// Example:
@request('fetch-user')
async *fetchUser(id: string): any {
  const user = await (yield { id });
  return user;
}

@respond('fetch-user')
async handleFetchUser({ id }: { id: string }) {
  return await fetch(`/api/users/${id}`).then(r => r.json());
}
```

### Observers

```typescript
@observe(target, selector?, options?)
// 'intersection' — viewport visibility
// 'resize' — element size changes
// 'media:(query)' — e.g. 'media:(min-width: 768px)'
// 'mutation:childList' | 'mutation:attributes' | 'mutation:attributes:name'
```

### Context & Router

```typescript
@context(options?: { debounce?, throttle?, once? })
// Receives Context on navigation and ctx.update() calls
// ctx.application — your app state
// ctx.navigation — { placards, route, params }
// ctx.fetch — middleware-aware fetch
// ctx.update() — signal all @context subscribers

Router({ target, type: 'hash' | 'pushstate', context?, layout?, fetcher? })
// Returns: { page, navigate, initialize }
// IMPORTANT: `page` from Router(), NOT from 'snice'
```

```typescript
// router.ts
export const { page, navigate, initialize } = Router({
  target: '#app',
  type: 'hash',
  context: { user: null },
  layout: 'app-shell'
});

// Guards: synchronous only, no async, no redirects
type Guard<T> = (context: T, params: RouteParams) => boolean
```

### Fetcher

```typescript
const fetcher = new ContextAwareFetcher();
fetcher.use('request', function(request, next) {
  const app = this.application as MyAppContext;
  if (app.user?.token) request.headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${app.user.token}`);
  return next();
});
// Pass to Router({ fetcher }), use via ctx.fetch() in pages
```

### Utilities

```typescript
@debounce(wait?, { leading?, trailing?, maxWait? })
@throttle(wait?, { leading?, trailing? })
@once(perInstance?)
@memoize({ keyGenerator?, maxSize?, ttl? })
```

---

## Template Syntax

```typescript
html`...`  // TemplateResult
css`...`   // CSSResult

attr="${val}"       // String attribute
.prop=${val}        // Property (objects, arrays)
?attr=${bool}       // Boolean attribute (toggles presence)
@event=${handler}   // Event listener (auto-bound)

<if ${condition}>...</if>
<case ${value}>
  <when value="x">...</when>
  <default>...</default>
</case>
${items.map(i => html`<li>${i}</li>`)}
```

**Pitfall**: Compound `<if>` expressions get stripped by minifiers — pre-compute as const.

---

## All Exports

```typescript
import {
  element, controller, layout,       // class decorators (page from Router)
  property, watch, context,          // state
  render, styles, html, css,         // rendering
  query, queryAll,                   // DOM
  on, dispatch,                      // events
  request, respond,                  // communication
  observe,                           // observers
  ready, dispose, moved, adopted,    // lifecycle
  Router,                            // routing
  debounce, throttle, once, memoize, // utilities
  useNativeElementControllers        // controller= on native elements
} from 'snice';
```

---

## Components (130+ published)

Import via side-effect: `import 'snice/components/button/snice-button'`

**Layout & Navigation:** accordion, breadcrumbs, card, carousel, divider, drawer, flip-card, layout, masonry, menu, modal, nav, pagination, segmented-control, split-pane, stepper, tabs, tree, virtual-scroller

**Forms & Input:** button, checkbox, chip, color-picker, date-picker, date-range-picker, date-time-picker, file-upload, input, radio, range-slider, rating, select, slider, split-button, step-input, switch, tag-input, textarea, time-picker, time-range-picker

**Data Display:** activity-feed, app-tiles, avatar, avatar-group, badge, calendar, candlestick, chart, code-block, color-display, countdown, data-card, diff, funnel, gantt, gauge, heatmap, image, invoice, kanban, key-value, kpi, leaderboard, list, map, metric-table, network-graph, org-chart, pdf-viewer, pricing-table, product-card, progress, progress-ring, qr-code, receipt, recipe, sankey, skeleton, sparkline, spreadsheet, stat-group, table, tag, timeline, timer, treemap, waterfall, weather, work-order

**Communication & Media:** audio-recorder, book, camera, camera-annotate, chat, comments, doc, draw, file-gallery, link, link-preview, location, markdown, message-strip, music-player, notification-center, paint, podcast-player, terminal, testimonial, toast, user-card, video-player

**Feedback & Status:** alert, approval-flow, availability, banner, booking, cart, cropper, empty-state, estimate, flow, login, order-tracker, permission-matrix, qr-reader, sortable, spinner, spotlight, tooltip

**Utility:** theme

Per-component docs available via MCP server (`get_component_docs` tool)

### Component Conventions
- Tag prefix: `snice-` (e.g., `<snice-button>`)
- `?open` toggles visibility; `.show()` / `.hide()` for imperative control
- Events: kebab-case (`count-changed`), data via `e.detail.value`
- Most support `variant` (default, primary, success, warning, error, info) and `size` (small, medium, large)
- CSS custom properties: `--snice-*` namespace

### CDN

```html
<script src="https://cdn.snice.dev/runtime/snice-runtime.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.snice.dev/components/snice-button.min.js"></script>
```

### React Adapters

```jsx
import { SniceButton } from 'snice/adapters/react';
```

React 17/18/19. Prop mapping, event callbacks, ref forwarding, form integration.

---

## Theming

CSS custom properties with `--snice-*` namespace. Dark mode via `data-theme="dark"` or `prefers-color-scheme`.

Core variables: `--snice-color-primary`, `-success`, `-warning`, `-danger`, `-neutral`, `-text`, `-text-secondary`, `-text-tertiary`, `-background`, `-background-element`, `-border`, `--snice-font-family`, `--snice-font-size-*`, `--snice-spacing-*`, `--snice-border-radius-*`, `--snice-shadow-*`, `--snice-transition-*`, `--snice-focus-ring-*`.

---

## Pitfalls

- **Not Lit**: Don't import from `lit` or extend `LitElement`
- **No `@state()`**: Use `@property()` for all reactive state
- **No `@customElement()`**: Use `@element('tag-name')`
- **No `reflect`**: Attributes sync automatically
- **Elements are visual only**: No fetch/API calls — use pages/controllers
- **Boolean attrs**: `"false"` string → `false`
- **Events**: kebab-case names, `e.detail.value` not `e.target.value`, `CustomEvent` not `Event`
- **`page`**: Comes from `Router()`, not `'snice'` exports
- **Router `type`**: Required — `'hash'` or `'pushstate'`
- **Guards**: Sync only, boolean return, no async/redirects
- **`<if>` expressions**: Compound expressions stripped by minifiers — pre-compute as const
- **Testing**: `await el.ready` before assertions, `el.shadowRoot.querySelector()` for shadow DOM

---

- https://snice.dev — Website with live demos and guides
- https://snice.dev/components.html — Interactive component demos
- https://snice.dev/guide.html — Getting started guide
- https://snice.dev/decorators.html — Decorator reference
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/snice
- MCP server: `claude mcp add snice -- npx snice mcp`
